sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
I clicked on 4 positions but only collected some blocks. Looking at the image:
- The pink block is still visible in the top region
- One green block remains in the middle (the rightmost one was at cols 43-47, I clicked at col 43 which might have been on the edge)
- The player is still in the top-left area
I need to collect the remaining blocks. Let me check what's left and click on the correct positions.
The pink block is at rows 19-21, cols 20-22, center (20, 21)
The remaining green block is at rows 31-35, cols 31-35, center (33, 33)
Wait, looking at the image more carefully:
- The pink block is still there in the top region
- There's one green block in the middle-right area
Let me click on the exact centers of the remaining blocks.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what blocks remain
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ('N', 'P'):  # light green or pink
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"Color {n['color']}: pixels={n['pixels']}, rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, center=({(min(rows)+max(rows))//2}, {(min(cols)+max(cols))//2})")

# Collect remaining blocks at their centers
action([
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 20, 'col': 21},  # pink block center
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 33, 'col': 33},  # green block center
])
</parameter>
<parameter=world_model>
{"game_tier": {"action_semantics": {"LEFT": "Moves player left ~6 columns; can trigger board reconfiguration VERIFIED(step 34)", "MOUSE": "Clicks on position - collects colored blocks VERIFIED(step 2)", "RIGHT": "Moves player right ~6 columns; can trigger board reconfiguration VERIFIED(step 14)"}, "object_taxonomy": {"background": "black with gray dots", "green_blocks": "light green 21-pixel blocks, collectable by MOUSE", "pink_blocks": "pink blocks, also collectable", "player": "blue+yellow small object", "platforms": "large sky blue regions"}, "hud_map": {"bottom_bar": "purple (left) + white (right) at row 63, likely progress/timer"}, "win_pattern": {}, "level_log": {"phase1": "7 green blocks, collected, RIGHT triggered reconfig", "phase2": "9 green blocks, collected, LEFT triggered reconfig", "phase3": "1 pink + 3 green blocks, collecting"}, "cross_level_notes": "Green blocks respawn after board reconfiguration. Multiple phases. Moving LEFT or RIGHT can trigger reconfiguration."}, "level_tier": {"world_model": "Level 1, phase 3. 1 pink block + 3 green blocks. Some collected, some remain.", "goal_model": "Collect all blocks then trigger next phase", "recent_findings": ["Phase 3 has pink block in top region, 3 green blocks in middle"], "open_questions": ["How many phases total?"], "current_plan": "Collect remaining blocks, then trigger reconfig", "strategy_log": ["RIGHT and LEFT both trigger reconfig"], "failed_probes": ["ACTION7", "Clicking player"]}}
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
